tooltips.analytics_total_lent: Original principal disbursed across the loans in this view.
tooltips.analytics_total_recovered: Principal already recovered from borrower payments. Penalties are excluded.
tooltips.analytics_total_outstanding: Remaining active balance still owed, including pending penalties on active installments.
tooltips.analytics_in_arrears: Late balance already past due, including pending penalties on overdue installments.
tooltips.analytics_penalties_pending: Late fees calculated or carried on active installments that have not been paid or waived yet.
tooltips.analytics_penalties_collected: Late fees already collected from borrowers.
tooltips.analytics_profit_projection: Expected remaining profit if current active agreements are paid as scheduled.
tooltips.analytics_total_profit: Realized profit plus future projected profit for the active operation.
tooltips.drawer_admin_actions: Operational actions to correct installments, move balances, waive debt or renew the agreement.
tooltips.drawer_edit_installment: Adjust due date, expected amount or pending penalty for this installment.
tooltips.drawer_reopen_installment: Recalculate the installment status from its current payments and reopen it if it should not stay marked as paid.
tooltips.drawer_waive_close: Forgive the remaining principal and penalties on this installment without recording new cash received.
tooltips.drawer_rollover: Move the unpaid balance to another installment or convert it into a renewal cycle.
tooltips.drawer_payment_history: Each entry represents a real payment or manual adjustment recorded on this installment. Edit entries to fix historical mistakes safely.
tooltips.drawer_agreement_history: Shows the original agreement plus renewals and restructures. The active agreement is the one that should drive the current outstanding balance.
tooltips.create_principal: Amount of capital you are lending before interest, penalties or renewals.
tooltips.create_interest_rate: Interest rate applied to the loan schedule. In simple mode it applies once to the whole loan. In compound mode it follows the PMT formula.
tooltips.create_installments: Number of scheduled installments in the original agreement.
tooltips.create_frequency: How often each installment is due. This defines the spacing between due dates in the original contract.
tooltips.create_start_date: Reference date used to generate the first due date and the rest of the installment schedule.
tooltips.renegotiate_date: Date used to calculate the settlement base and any penalties before creating the new agreement.
tooltips.renegotiate_forgive_penalties: When enabled, pending penalties stay in history but do not enter the new agreement base.
tooltips.renegotiate_installments_count: Number of installments that will be created in the new agreement.
tooltips.renegotiate_rate: Flat percentage applied once to the settlement base in this restructuring flow.
